mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plans p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{description}, '%')) AND LOWER(p.visibility) = LOWER(#{visibility})
SELECT * FROM plans p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{description}, '%'))

SELECT * FROM plans p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND ((p.user_id = #{userId1} AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')) OR (p.user_id = #{userId2} AND p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{description}, '%')))

SELECT * FROM plans p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND ((LOWER(p.visibility) = LOWER(#{visibility1}) AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')) OR (LOWER(p.visibility) = LOWER(#{visibility2}) AND p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{description}, '%')))

SELECT * FROM plans p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND ((p.user_id = #{userId1} AND LOWER(p.visibility) = LOWER(#{visibility1}) AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')) OR (p.user_id = #{userId2} AND LOWER(p.visibility) = LOWER(#{visibility2}) AND p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{description}, '%')))

SELECT * FROM plans p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND ((LOWER(p.visibility) = LOWER(#{visibility1}) AND p.user_id != #{userId1} AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')) OR (LOWER(p.visibility) = LOWER(#{visibility2}) AND p.user_id != #{userId2} AND p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{description}, '%')))
